zh.Checkley, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas De Pershale於1343年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利時，他的父親Richard de Pershale22歲，母親Joan Chetwynd21歲。他於大約1362年與Lady Philippa Bennett在英國斯塔福爾可利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1381年在他的家鄉享年38歲。

zh-hans.Checkley, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾可利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas De Pershale于1343年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可利时，他的父亲Richard de Pershale22岁，母亲Joan Chetwynd21岁。他于大约1362年与Lady Philippa Bennett在英国斯塔福爾可利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1381年在他的家乡享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pershale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Perschall, a variant of Parschall (see Parshall ); alternatively, a variant of Perschel, from a pet form of Persch, a short form of Berthold or Peter in the border area with Czechia.

variants.name: Parshall
meanings: Americanized form of South German Parschall, a variant of Parschalk, a status name for a freeholder (a freeman with few service obligations), from Middle High German bar ‘naked’, ‘free from, apparent’ + schalk ‘servant, man’. See Pershall .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas De Pershale was born in 1343, in Checkley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Pershale, was 22 and his mother, Joan Chetwynd, was 21. He married Lady Philippa Bennett about 1362, in Checkley, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1381, in his hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas De Pershale est né en 1343, à Checkley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Pershale, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Chetwynd, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Philippa Bennett environ 1362, à Checkley, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1381, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas De Pershale 1343 in Checkley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Pershale 22 und seine Mutter Joan Chetwynd 21. Er hat um 1362 in Checkley, Staffordshire, England Lady Philippa Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1381 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Pershale è nato il nel 1343 nel Checkley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Pershale, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan Chetwynd, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Philippa Bennett circa 1362, nel Checkley, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1381, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.Checkley, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェックリー
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas De Pershaleが1343年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェックリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Pershaleは22歳，母Joan Chetwyndは21歳であった。約1362年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェックリーでLady Philippa Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1381年に故郷で38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas De Pershale(이)가 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 체클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Pershale(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Chetwynd(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1362년 영국 스태퍼드실르 체클리에서 Lady Philippa Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Checkley, Staffordshire, England: Checkley, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Pershale nasceu em 1343, em Checkley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Pershale, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan Chetwynd, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Philippa Bennett aproximadamente 1362, em Checkley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1381, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas De Pershale родился в 1343 г. в местности чеккли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Pershale было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Chetwynd, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Philippa Bennett около 1362 г. в местности чеккли, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1381 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.

sm.from 1377 to 1385: mai le 1377 e o'o I le 1385

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas De Pershale nació en 1343, en Checkley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Pershale, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan Chetwynd, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Philippa Bennett aproximadamente 1362, en Checkley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1381, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años.
